global.description: The ad features a modern design with a blue background and bold text elements.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to explore trending content with a free trial.

elements.label: Abstract geometric shapes
elements.description: The background features a blue gradient with various abstract geometric shapes in lighter shades.

elements.label: StarVault logo
elements.description: The logo displays the word 'StarVault' in bold, modern typography, prominently positioned at the top.

elements.label: Geometric circle
elements.description: A large, light blue circle is positioned in the background, adding depth to the design.

elements.label: Geometric square
elements.description: A medium-sized square shape in a lighter blue hue is placed in the center, contrasting with the background.

elements.label: Learn more button
elements.description: A small, rounded button at the bottom with the text 'Learn more' in white, set against a blue background.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: The headline text 'Watch what's trending' is bold and white, positioned centrally for emphasis.

elements.label: Subheadline text
elements.description: The subheadline 'Start free today' is in a smaller font, white in color, located just below the main headline.
elements.text_content: Watch what's trending Start free today

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, rewarded_video, clean and modern, StarVault logo, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the main headline and subheadline in the center, with the CTA button at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Watch what's trending, Start free today, StarVault, Learn more
